message:
test(mvcc): update GC free-list regression for deferred EBR retirement

The D5 retirement plumbing changed the observable behavior of prune_page_chain().
Pruned versions are now extracted with take_for_retirement(), which bumps the
slot generation immediately but defers free-list reuse until recycle_slots()
runs after a grace period.

Update the GC regression accordingly so it now asserts the actual two-phase
contract:
- prune_page_chain() reports the retired indices without immediately increasing
  free_count()
- the returned pruned_indices set has the expected size
- recycle_slots() restores those slots to the arena free list once reclamation
  is allowed

This keeps the test aligned with the new EBR semantics instead of encoding the
old immediate-free behavior as if it were still correct.
